allow: Bash(python -c "import json, sys; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Question:', data.get\('question'\)\); print\('Answer length:', len\(data.get\('answer', ''\)\)\); print\('Source teacher:', data.get\('source_teacher'\)\); print\('Verification source:', data.get\('verification_source'\)\); print\('Topics:', data.get\('topics'\)\)")
